creator: k5@cheerful.com
text:
Bochs is now owed by MandrakeSoft S.A. and they re-released it
	under terms of LGPL; RESTRICTED is not suitable anymore.
	The changes they have made since previous release are almost
	copyright and documentation issue.

Fix: Update to version 2000_0325a and also remove bochs entry from
	ports/LEGAL.
